analysis:
1. Check the prices of the two wine bottles you are holding and calculate the total cost if buying one of each.
2. Check if there are any wines from the same country of origin as the wine with the gold cap that are priced below 150 yuan.
3. If such wines exist, add the cheapest one to the shopping cart. If multiple wines tie for the lowest price, add one of each of those tied items to the cart.
4. If no such wines exist, add the two wine bottles you are holding to the shopping cart.
5. Calculate the total tax amount for the items in the shopping cart.
